name: home-grid
description: 9-card responsive category browse grid for the documentation wiki home page. Always renders all 9 ratified categories regardless of article count — including empty categories with '0 articles — in preparation' placeholder. 3-col → 2-col (960px) → 1-col (640px). Carbon Tile pattern extended with a top-3 child list + 'More →' link per card.
html:
Browse by category

Architecture

12 articles

  • Three-layer stack
  • Compounding substrate
  • Citation substrate
More →

Help

0 articles — in preparation
category_set_note: Operator-ratified order per naming-convention.md §10 Q5-A. Do not alphabetize or re-order. Render all 9 always — suppressing empty categories is not permitted.

variants.name: populated
variants.description: Card shows count + top-3 child links + 'More →' link.

variants.name: empty
variants.description: Card shows '0 articles — in preparation' only. No child list, no More link.

aria: <section aria-label='Browse by category'> carries the visual heading via aria-label so screen readers announce the region. Card role: plain <article> (no role override). Heading hierarchy: h2 for section heading, h3 for card title. :focus-visible ring on every link. Keyboard: tab order follows DOM order (ratified 9-category render order).
ai_hint: 9-card grid is structurally machine-readable: each card carries stable category slug, numeric count, and 3 child slugs. RAG agents can extract category-to-article mappings without parsing prose. 9-category set is closed and operator-ratified.
open_questions: Class-name prefix: keep .wiki-* (engine-internal scope) OR rename to .ps-* (substrate-shared scope)? Substrate ratifies; engine updates static/style.css accordingly.
Empty-state copy ratification: '0 articles — in preparation' is iteration-1 placeholder. Substrate may ratify as canonical platform-wide OR allow per-deployment customization.
